headline: Is Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Preparing to Navigate AI Threat
summary: Willis Towers Watson plc (NASDAQ:WTW) is one of the 11 best insurance stocks to buy right now. On February 26, Morgan Stanley reduced the firm’s price target on Willis Towers Watson plc (NASDAQ:WTW) from $345 to $330. The firm maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The update comes as the firm revised its […]
